title: meehania urticifolia f. normalis
intro: Meehania urticifolia f. normalis, also known as False Dragonhead, is a perennial herb native to East Asia, characterized by its distinctive square stem and blue-purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Meehania urticifolia f. normalis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
